name: Nintex Process Automation API
what_it_does: Process automation and workflow platform with REST API — enabling organizations to automate business processes with visual workflow builders, generate documents from templates, capture digital signatures, create forms, and integrate across enterprise systems including SharePoint, Salesforce, and ServiceNow.
use_cases: Triggering process workflow instances programmatically via Nintex API
Querying workflow status and completion data for process monitoring dashboards
Integrating Nintex document generation with CRM or ERP-triggered events
Managing workflow template versions and publishing via API
Pulling process analytics (cycle time, bottlenecks, completion rates) for improvement
not_for: Developer-centric infrastructure automation (use Terraform or Ansible)
Simple personal task automation (use Make or Zapier for individual workflows)
Real-time data pipeline orchestration (use Airflow or Prefect)
best_when: A large organization needs enterprise-grade process automation for HR, finance, legal, or IT workflows with SharePoint/Microsoft 365 integration, document generation, and no-code process design for business teams.
avoid_when: You need simple personal automation, developer-centric infrastructure automation, or data pipeline orchestration rather than business process management.

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials flow for server-to-server. Bearer token auth. Tenant-scoped access with role-based permissions. Webhook for workflow events. SharePoint integration via Microsoft OAuth. Nintex for SharePoint (on-prem) has different auth from Nintex Cloud (SaaS). Verify deployment type for correct auth flow.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-process or per-user licensing; contact sales
pricing.notes: Australian company (Melbourne). Founded 2006. Private equity-backed. Raised $215M+. Backed by Vista Equity Partners and TA Associates. 10,000+ customers across 90 countries. Microsoft ecosystem specialist — deep SharePoint and Microsoft 365 integration. Nintex Process Platform includes workflow, forms, document generation, mobile apps, and RPA. Strong in government, healthcare, and financial services.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for workflows, instances, forms, and reports. OAuth2 bearer token. Moderate documentation. On-premises (Nintex for SharePoint) vs cloud (Nintex Cloud) have different API surfaces. Workflow instance creation starts processes but configuration is in Nintex Studio. Webhook for process events.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Workflow reads idempotent. Instance status reads idempotent. Form reads idempotent. Workflow instance creation not idempotent — check for existing before triggering.
known_agent_gotchas: On-premises vs cloud deployment has different API endpoints and auth
Nintex for SharePoint vs Nintex Cloud are separate products with different APIs
OAuth2 client credentials required — server-to-server auth setup needed
Workflow design in Nintex Studio — API triggers, doesn't design workflows
Enterprise pricing with annual contract — validate before integration investment

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, ISO27001, FedRAMP, GDPR compliant. US, EU, AU data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. Business process data can include sensitive HR, legal, and financial information. On-premises deployment option for regulated industries. Vista/TA Associates PE backing brings enterprise security standards.
